Adhesive Plastic Sliding Discs in Gray 4 Pack (Set of 4) Add to Cart At a Glance Assembly Tools Included Manufactured Wood Storage Included Warranty Length: 1 Year See More Description About This Product Combine stylish design with practical storage using this rectangular coffee table, crafted to elevate your living space while keeping it organized. The 47" tabletop offers ample surface space for drinks, decor, or everyday items, while four spacious storage drawers discreetly hold remotes, magazines, and household clutter. A distinctive ripple side design adds elegant texture that complements farmhouse, modern, rustic, and contemporary decor styles. Built from premium engineered wood with a reinforced frame, this table provides sturdy, wobble-free support for up to 200 lbs. Its space-efficient rectangular shape fits comfortably in apartments, cozy living rooms, or home offices. Assembly is quick and hassle-free with tool-free setup and included hardware—ready to enjoy in 15 minutes or less. Features 4 Spacious Storage Drawers for Tidy Living Spaces – Say goodbye to cluttered tabletops! The built-in drawers offer ample room to store remotes, coasters, magazines, and living room odds and ends, keeping your space organized and visually clean. Unique Ripple Side Design Elevates Any Decor Style – The eye-catching ripple detailing adds a touch of elegance to this wood coffee table, seamlessly fitting farmhouse, modern, rustic, or contemporary home aesthetics as a standout centerpiece. Sturdy Wood Construction for Long-Lasting Durability – Crafted from premium engineered wood with a reinforced frame, this rectangular coffee table supports up to 200 lbs, perfect for holding drinks, snacks, books, or decorative items without wobbling. Space-Efficient Rectangular Shape for Versatile Use – The compact yet functional rectangular design works flawlessly in small apartments, cozy living rooms, or home offices—no wasted space, just practical style for daily life. Tool-Free Quick Assembly with All Hardware Included – Skip the complicated setup! Follow the step-by-step instructions to assemble this coffee table in 15 minutes or less, with all necessary parts packed in the box for hassle-free installation.
